0.$description: Instant state changes and reduced-motion fallbacks.

faster.$description: Tiny feedback transitions such as pressed states.

fast.$description: Frequent lightweight UI transitions such as tab indicators and small fades.

default.$description: Default component motion for popovers, menus, and routine state changes.

moderate.$description: Slightly larger routine transitions that need a little more legibility.

slow.$description: Larger surfaces such as dialogs and compact sheets.

slower.$description: Large or rare surface motion where extra continuity is useful.

linear.$description: Constant-rate motion for loops and progress-like animations.

enter.$description: Strong ease-out curve for elements entering or becoming active.

exit.$description: Accelerating curve for elements exiting or becoming hidden.

move.$description: Intentional on-screen movement between persistent positions.
